cart.title: Adventurer's Pack
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Please add a gold ledger address to continue your commission.
cart.howToPay: How do you wish to pay your gold?
cart.addCardPrompt: To add a coin purse, please click the Add New Coin Purse button.
cart.allUpToDate: You are fully up to date, brave adventurer!
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: No unpaid gold due notices found.
cart.thankYouForOrder: The guild thanks you for your commission, brave adventurer!
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Please deliver the gold for service activation. When gold is received, your service will be immediately activated.
cart.bankPaymentNote: After gold is delivered, open a quest ticket with the transaction ID, date, and amount paid. We will manually credit the gold payment.

creditCard.name: Hero Name
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Verification is required before your coin purse is available for use. InterServer will charge your coin purse two amounts under 1 gold coin each.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: These charges will appear on your gold ledger statement within a couple of minutes, usually under pending transactions. If you do not see these charges, please contact your coin purse keeper for more details.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: These authorization charges are only for verification purposes and will be voided within 3-5 days, depending on your treasury.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: I accept two temporary charges under 1 gold coin each.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Enter your coin purse's treasury portal or call your treasurer to verify the two amounts charged. They often appear under Pending Charges with your treasury. These authorization charges will vanish in about 3-5 days depending on your treasury.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Please enter the two amounts charged to your coin purse. The values must be in USD gold standard.
creditCard.currencyNote: Please note that the charges on your coin purse statement may be in a different currency from the one required on the last confirmation scroll described above. If your coin purse statement does not display the original transaction amounts in the required currency, you will have to contact your coin purse keeper. They should be able to tell you the amounts of the two charges in the original currency.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove your coin purse {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: This coin purse has been authenticated and enabled for use in our guild.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Click here to activate this coin purse for use.

paymentSuccess.title: Gold Payment Quest Complete!
paymentSuccess.thankYou: The guild thanks you for your gold payment, brave adventurer! Your transaction has been completed successfully.

paymentTypes.title: Gold Payment Methods
paymentTypes.ccNote: All coin purses must be verified before use. To verify them, click the "Verify" button.
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Are you sure you want to destroy your gold due notice {id}?

prepays.title: Pre-Loaded Coin Pouch
prepays.autoUseInvoices: Automatically apply to gold due notices:
prepays.showingPage: Showing tome page {page} of {totalPages} and {records} records out of {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Automatically apply to new gold due notices
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Are you sure you want to destroy your coin pouch #{id} and its related ledger history?
